description: Create packages/security-advanced/ - Defense-in-depth security layer with enhanced CSRF (double-submit cookie pattern), API key management with scoping/rotation, IP reputation scoring/blocking, secure session management (fingerprinting, concurrent limits, revocation), and field-level PII encryption (AES-256-GCM). Wire CSRF and session plugins into server-core.
steps: Create packages/security-advanced/package.json with name @quant/security-advanced, deps: ioredis, zod, pino, @quant/common. Scripts: build/typecheck/test/lint

Create packages/security-advanced/src/types.ts - CSRFConfig, CSRFTokenPair, APIKeyConfig, APIKeyRecord, APIKeyScope, IPReputationRule, IPScore, SessionConfig, SessionRecord, SessionFingerprint, EncryptionConfig, EncryptedField types
Create packages/security-advanced/src/csrf-protection.ts - DoubleSubmitCSRF class: generateToken() creates cookie+header pair, validate(cookie, header) verifies match, Fastify plugin factory

Create packages/security-advanced/src/api-key-manager.ts - APIKeyManager class: generate(scopes, expiry), validate(key), rotate(keyId), revoke(keyId), listActive(). Uses crypto.randomBytes for key generation, stores hashed keys

Create packages/security-advanced/src/ip-reputation.ts - IPReputationService class: score(ip) returns risk score 0-100, block(ip, reason, duration), unblock(ip), isBlocked(ip). Configurable rules for scoring

Create packages/security-advanced/src/session-manager.ts - SecureSessionManager class: create(userId, metadata), validate(sessionId, fingerprint), revoke(sessionId), revokeAll(userId), listActive(userId), enforceConcurrencyLimit(userId, maxSessions). Fingerprint = hash of IP+UA+acceptLanguage

Create packages/security-advanced/src/encryption.ts - FieldEncryption class: encrypt(plaintext, key) using AES-256-GCM with random IV, decrypt(ciphertext, key), rotateKey(oldKey, newKey, data). Proper crypto.createCipheriv usage
Create packages/security-advanced/src/__tests__/csrf-protection.test.ts - test token generation, validation, mismatch rejection
Create packages/security-advanced/src/__tests__/api-key-manager.test.ts - test generate, validate, rotate, revoke, scope checking
Create packages/security-advanced/src/__tests__/session-manager.test.ts - test create, validate fingerprint, concurrency limits, revocation
Create packages/security-advanced/src/__tests__/encryption.test.ts - test encrypt/decrypt round-trip, different IVs produce different ciphertext, wrong key fails
acceptance_criteria: pnpm turbo test --filter=@quant/security-advanced passes with all tests green
Encryption uses Node crypto module with AES-256-GCM (not a toy implementation)
findings: All 37 tests pass across 5 test suites. Typecheck, build, lint all green. Used bind() pattern instead of this-aliasing to satisfy eslint no-this-alias rule. Prettier reformatted on commit via lint-staged hook without breaking anything.
